incomingEvents.description: User searched for a vehicle/unit in the Angular UI

availableCommands.description: Trigger a unit/vehicle search in the Angular UI
availableCommands.when: User explicitly asks you to search for a specific vehicle

rules: Only send commands when user explicitly requests an action
Always explain what you are doing before sending a command
Commands execute automatically - user will see results in UI
Never invent new command types - only use those listed above
